title: The FFK Project
description: Kitchen-Sink modpack with mods from magic to tech and exploration. A wide variety of mods to choose from and enjoy!
body: A Kitchen-Sink modpack with mods from magic to tech and exploration. A wide variety of mods to choose from and enjoy! This modpack is meant for play on SMPs (Survival Multiplayer) servers with friends, however it can be played alone and will still be enjoyable. Using performance enhancing mods, you can play this modpack on low end computers as well without issue! Mods such as the Essentials mod provide quality of life features such as connecting to each other's singleplayer worlds without having to do any port-forwarding at all! Have customization through the Essentials' paid and free cosmetics as well as Cosmetica's completely free cosmetics. Mods such as create allow for completely automated factories and complex builds, train networks, and can automate building with blueprints. Then take your builds up a notch with Supplementaries' many different decoration blocks and much more! For a list of all the mods, click here. - [**3D Skin Layers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Render the player skin layer in 3d! - [**Ad Astra**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) - Live long and prosper, Ad Astra! - [**Allay in a Bottle**](https://modrinth.com/mod/allay-in-a-bottle) - Easily catch Allays or Vexes and transport them without hassle. - [**Alternate Origin GUI**](https://modrinth.com/mod/altorigingui) - Overhauls the origin selection screen to show multiple in a grid for selection. - [**AppleSkin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements - [**Architectury API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods. - [**Attack On Villager**](https://modrinth.com/mod/attack-on-villager) - You can attack villages but they fight back. - [**AzureLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib) - Based off Geckolib but now just for my own needs. - [**BCLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bclib) - A Library Mod for the BetterX Team - [**Bartering Station**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bartering-station) - Still running around bartering manually? Let's put those lazy piglins to work instead! - [**Beacon Overhaul**](https://modrinth.com/mod/beaconoverhaul) - Introduces a tier system and better effect scaling for beacons. - [**Better Allay**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-allay) - Customize how allay differentiates between potions and tipped arrows. Optionally can make allays pick up items even when mob griefing is off and set time for how long allay likes noteblock. - [**Better Animations Collection**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-animations-collection) - Changing the in-game models to allow for better animations and subtle effects. - [**BetterEnd**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) - New Biomes, mysterious rituals and Mobs for your End - [**BetterLeads**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterleads) - Allows you to use leads on more entities - [**BetterNether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) - More Biomes, More Mobs, More Tools for the fiery Dimension - [**Bits And Chisels**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bits-and-chisels) - Turn Blocks Into Small Bits With Chisels; Build All The Things - [**Blind's Music Discs**](https://modrinth.com/mod/blinds-music-discs) - Some additional Music Discs for your enjoyment or disappointment as well as a new jukeboxes to play them in. - [**Blur (Fabric)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric) - Adds a blur effect to all GUI backgrounds - now for Fabric! - [**Botarium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/botarium) - A crossplatform API for devs that makes transfer and storage of items, fluids and energy easier, as well as some other helpful things - [**Brutes Drop Scraps**](https://modrinth.com/mod/brutes-drop-scraps) - Piglin Brutes have a chance of dropping Netherite Scraps. - [**CC: Restitched**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-restitched) - ComputerCraft Tweaked for Fabric - [**CC:C Bridge**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cccbridge) - Adds compatibility between the ComputerCraft and Create mod via peripherals! - [**Chicken Drop Feathers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chicken-drop-feathers) - Chicken will drop feathers from time to time. - [**Chunks fade in**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in) - A simple mod that adds fade-in animation for chunks! - [**Chunky**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky) - Pre-generates chunks, quickly and efficiently - [**Cloth Config API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods - [**Collective**](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) - 🎓 Collective is a shared library with common code for all of Serilum's mods. - [**Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft. - [**Conduits Prevent Drowned**](https://modrinth.com/mod/conduits-prevent-drowned) - ❌ Disables drowned zombie spawns around the player when the conduit effect is active. - [**Continents**](https://modrinth.com/mod/continents) - Continents is a small add-on mod to reshape the world so that landmasses are further apart, varying in size and shape. - [**Cosmetica**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetica) - Free custom capes and cosmetics for Minecraft - [**Create Fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - Building Tools and Aesthetic Technology - [**Create Ore Excavation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation) - Extract resources using machines powered by Rotational Force - [**Create Slice & Dice**](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice) - Making automation for Farmers Delight more sensible - [**Create: Steam n’ Rails**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails) - Adding depth to Create's rail network & steam system - [**Cull Leaves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) - Adds culling to leaf blocks, providing a huge performance boost over vanilla. - [**Dark Waters**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-waters) - There is something hidden in the storms and it approaches - [**Deeper and Darker**](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) - A Minecraft 1.19 mod which features more blocks, items, armors, and hidden mysteries to complement the new Deep Dark biome. Our website: https://kyanitemods.dev - [**DirectionHUD**](https://modrinth.com/mod/directionhud) - A plugin style HUD mod for fabric. Fully customizable HUD with features to save coordinates, log deaths, and player tracking! - [**Dynamic Crosshair**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) - A mod that hides or changes the crosshair dependent on context - [**Dynamic Crosshair Compat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshaircompat) - Mod compatibility for Dynamic Crosshair - [**ESSENTIAL Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) - Boost your Minecraft. Play together without a server. Customize your character. And more. - [**Emotecraft**](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft) - Create your own emotes in Minecraft. - [**Ender Dragon Fight Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/edf-remastered) - An up in difficulty for Minecraft's final boss. With more health and more attacks, the fight finally feels like the final confrontation. - [**Entangled**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entangled) - Entangled allows you to 'entangle' two blocks together! - [**Entity Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible - [**Explosive Enhancement**](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) - Makes the explosion animation look cooler. - [**Extra Damage Enchantments**](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-damage-enchantments) - Adds additional special damage enchantments (similar to smite) and associated entity groups. - [**Extra Origins**](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-origins) - Adds more origins to the Origins mod - [**Extra Sponges**](https://modrinth.com/mod/extrasponges) - Adds stronger material based sponges! - [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain. - [**Fabric Language Kotlin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - Fabric Language Kotlin - [**Fabrishot**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot) - Take insanely large screenshots because why not - [**Falling Leaves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks - [**Forge Config API Port**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - Forge's whole config system provided to the Fabric ecosystem. Designed for a multiloader architecture. - [**Freecam (Modrinth Edition)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) - A highly customizable freecam mod. - [**Friends&Foes (Fabric)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) - Adds outvoted and forgotten mobs from the mob votes in a believable vanilla plus style. (Copper Golem, Glare, Moobloom, Iceologer, Barnacle, Wildfire, Illusioner, Rascal, Tuff Golem) - [**Geckolib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) - A 3D animation library for entities, blocks, items, armor, and more! - [**ImmediatelyFast**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft - [**Immersive Aircraft**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) - A bunch of rustic aircraft to travel, transport, and explore! - [**Immersive structures**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-structures) - Additional structure packs - [**Indium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo - [**Iris Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs - [**Item Collectors**](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-collectors) - Item Collectors adds Collectors which collect items in a specified range! - [**JourneyMap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) - Real-time mapping in game or in a web browser as you explore. - [**Just Enough Items**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - JEI - View Items and Recipes - [**LambDynamicLights**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - A dynamic lights mod for Fabric. - [**LambdaBetterGrass**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass) - A Minecraft mod which adds better grass and snow to the game. - [**Let's Do: Beachparty**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-beachparty) - Get your Suncream out! We're going to the beach. - [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod - [**Mage Hand**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mage-hand) - A Magical Take on Item Automation. Adds magic hands that can automate basic tasks. - [**Magitek Mechs**](https://modrinth.com/mod/magitek-mechs) - Craft and pilot FF6-style Magitek Armor - [**Marium's Soulslike Weaponry**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry) - A minecraft mod that adds new bosses and legendary weapons - [**Meowing**](https://modrinth.com/mod/meowing) - Pick up your Cat and let it meow at stuff - [**Mine Cells - Dead Cells Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecells) - Dead Cells content in Minecraft - [**Missing Wilds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/missing-wilds) - Adds the features that were scrapped from the Wild Update - [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed. - [**Moonlight Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight) - dynamic data pack and registration, villager activities, custom map marker and a lot more - [**More Axolotl Variants API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mavapi) - Lightweight API to implement new axolotl variants. - [**More Axolotl Variants Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mavm) - Adds more axolotl variants! - [**Mouse Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons. - [**No Hostiles Around Campfire**](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-hostiles-around-campfire) - 🔥 Prevents hostile mob spawns and burns them around the campfire in a configurable radius. - [**Not Enough Animations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person - [**Nyf's Spiders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-spiders) - Modifes spiders to be more realistic - [**Origins**](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) - Players choose an Origin at the beginning of the game to gain benefits and drawbacks - [**PatPatPat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/patpatpat) - Pat your pets! - [**Pehkui**](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) - Lets you change the size of most entities, shrinking them smaller or growing them larger - [**Philips Ruins**](https://modrinth.com/mod/philips-ruins) - This mod adds ancient ruins to your Minecraft world - [**Potato PC**](https://modrinth.com/mod/potato-pc) - Adds a literal potato pc with a literal potato operating system - [**Presence Footsteps**](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) - ..An Overly complicated Sound Mod... - [**Puzzles Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) - Why's it called Puzzles you ask? That's the puzzle! - [**Reaper**](https://modrinth.com/mod/reaper) - An add-on to Spirit that allows you to generate energy from reaping mobs and utilize the data in souls to affect nearby mobs and players - [**Reese's Sodium Options**](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium - [**Repurposed Structures - Quilt/Fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric) - Adds more variations of vanilla structures and features such as a Jungle Fortress! - [**Resourceful Config**](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-config) - Resourceful Config is a mod that allows for developers to make cross-platform configs - [**Resourceful Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib) - Resourceful Lib - [**Respawnable Pets**](https://modrinth.com/mod/respawnable-pets) - A simple mod that allows your pets to respawn after death when you next sleep using a new item, the Etheric Gem. - [**Respawning Shulkers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/respawning-shulkers) - 🟪 Shulkers will respawn at their death location after a configurable delay, farm shells sustainably. - [**Riding Partners**](https://modrinth.com/mod/riding-partners) - Ride Together, Explore More - [**Runes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/runes) - 🪨 Craft runes to serve as ammo for spells - [**Shulker Drops Two**](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulker-drops-two) - 🟪 Allows Shulkers to drop two or more shells and ignore their default drop chance. - [**Silence Mobs**](https://modrinth.com/mod/silence-mobs) - 🙊 Silence or mute mobs and villager with The Silence Stick. - [**Simple Magnets**](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-magnets) - Simple Magnets adds Magnets that pickup items around the player! - [**Simple Pipes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-pipes) - Heavily stripped down port of BuildCraft's "transport" module - [**Skylib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/skylib) - The library for SkylorBecks mods. - [**SmartBrainLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/smartbrainlib) - A brain library for Minecraft, making the brain system easier to use and manage - [**Smooth Boot (Fabric)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric) - Improve Minecraft CPU scheduling - [**Smooth Swapping**](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping) - Moves items smoothly in inventories - [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves frame rates and micro-stutter, while fixing graphical issues - [**Sodium Extra**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - Features that shouldn't be in Sodium. - [**Sound Physics Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) - A Minecraft mod that provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks. - [**Spawn Animations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-animations) - Hostile mobs dig out of the ground or poof into existence when they spawn! - [**Spell Engine**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine) - 🪄 Data driven magic library - [**Spell Power Attributes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-power) - 🔮 Spell Power entity attributes with related status effects and enchantments - [**Spellblades and Such**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spellblades-and-such) - Magic and More! Add-on for Spell Engine - [**Spirit**](https://modrinth.com/mod/spirit) - Create your own configurable mob spawner! - [**Sprinklerz**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sprinklerz) - a mod to hydrate and speed up crop growth - [**SuperMartijn642's Config Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-config-lib) - Config Lib makes dealing with config files just a bit easier. - [**SuperMartijn642's Core Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-core-lib) - SuperMartijn642's Core Lib adds lots of basic implementations that allow for similar code between different Minecraft versions! - [**Supplementaries**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - Vanilla+ additions: Jars, signposts, faucets, weather vanes spring launchers, sconces, planters, lights, decoration and automation - [**Tectonic**](https://modrinth.com/mod/tectonic) - Enhanced terrain generation with mountain ranges, underground rivers, and more! - [**The Graveyard (FABRIC)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric) - A mod that adds structures, mobs, bosses and blocks themed aroung the graveyard. - [**The Printer**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-printer) - Duplicate items at the cost of experience and time - [**Towns and Towers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers) - Spice up your world with new villages, pillager outposts, and even new ships! - [**Trash Cans**](https://modrinth.com/mod/trash-cans) - Trash Cans adds trash cans which can be used to void items, liquids, and energy! - [**Trinkets**](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) - A data-driven accessory mod - [**Ultris: Boss Expansion**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ultris) - Explore 8 new and exciting bosses to take on across your world, with new structures, items, and stories for you to unravel. - [**Very Many Players (Fabric)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) - A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts. - [**VillEdit**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villedit) - VillEdit let’s you edit villagers’ trades, profession, level, name, and more! - [**Village Spawn Point**](https://modrinth.com/mod/village-spawn-point) - 🏙 Sets the spawn point in a new world to the center of a village. - [**Villager Death Messages**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-death-messages) - ⚰ Broadcasts an informational death message whenever a villager passes away. - [**Villager Names**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-names-serilum) - 🧑‍🌾 A minimalistic mod which gives all unnamed (modded) villagers a pre-defined or custom name. - [**Visuality**](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles. - [**Vitalize**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vitalize) - An addon for Spirit that simulates the killing of mobs and their drops - [**WTHIT**](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit) - What the hell is that? - [**Where Is It**](https://modrinth.com/mod/where-is-it) - Search for items in nearby inventories. - [**Xaero's Minimap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Displays the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, entities in the corner of your screen. Lets you create waypoints which help you find the locations you've marked. - [**Xaero's World Map**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world. Works great together with Xaero's Minimap. - [**YetAnotherConfigLib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft. - [**Zoomify**](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - A zoom mod with infinite customizability. - [**bad packets**](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets) - Bad Packets allows packet messaging between different modding platforms. - [**cat_jam**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cat_jam) - makes cats jam to the rhythm of music discs :3 - [**🐈 WPIT (Whose Pet Is That?)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/wpit) - Uncover the mysterious pets around your Minecraft world.
